applied_optimizations.name: torch.compile with mode=default
applied_optimizations.description: Applied torch.compile(mode='default') to the forward method. The inductor autotuned optimal Triton kernels for convolutions and GEMMs automatically. Also set AMD ROCm environment variables (GPU_MAX_HW_QUEUES=2, HIP_FORCE_DEV_KERNARG=1, HSA_NO_SCRATCH_RECLAIM=1, TORCH_BLAS_PREFER_HIPBLASLT=1) and torch.set_float32_matmul_precision('high').

attempted_but_failed.name: PYTORCH_TUNABLEOP_ENABLED
attempted_but_failed.reason: Caused Triton compilation errors (ttg.async_copy_global_to_local legalization failure)
attempted_but_failed.error: failed to legalize operation 'ttg.async_copy_global_to_local' that was explicitly marked illegal

notes: torch.compile autotuned optimal Triton kernels automatically
Best convolution kernel: triton_convolution2d with BLOCK_M=64, BLOCK_N=16, BLOCK_K=16
Best GEMM kernel: triton_mm with BLOCK_M=64, BLOCK_N=32, BLOCK_K=64
PYTORCH_TUNABLEOP_ENABLED caused Triton compilation errors on gfx950, disabled it

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_6
attempted_but_failed.reason: Agent has failed silently 5 consecutive times. Providing the exact shell commands to copy-paste, including the complete generated_kernel.py file via heredoc. This is the last attempt before stopping.

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_7
attempted_but_failed.reason: Agent has failed silently 6 consecutive times (trials 2-7) with zero output, despite increasingly specific instructions culminating in exact copy-paste shell commands. The agent appears fundamentally

global_notes: LeNet-5 is a small model where torch.compile provides modest but meaningful speedup
The main bottlenecks are convolution operations (~50% combined)
Further optimization would require custom Triton kernels for conv2d or better fusion strategies
